subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the divine Lote-Tree! Some days ago a letter was dispatched, wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الرحمانیه چند روز قبل رقیمه ارسال گردید و مراتب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
